description: Audit the VistA security configuration to identify which users hold the 'Programmer Mode' key (XUPROG). VistA uses a dual-key security model where the Security Key file (^XUSEC) acts as a reverse index, mapping keys to the users who hold them. Use the YDBGui Global Viewer to inspect the ^XUSEC global and identify the Internal Entry Numbers (DUZs) of users who possess the XUPROG key. The global structure follows the format ^XUSEC("KEY_NAME", DUZ).
